Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\('SELECT version FROM auth.schema_migrations ORDER BY version'\)\).then\(r=>{r.rows.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.version\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\('SELECT tgname, tgrelid::regclass, tgenabled FROM pg_trigger WHERE tgrelid = chr\(39\)||chr\(97\)||chr\(117\)||chr\(116\)||chr\(104\)||chr\(46\)||chr\(117\)||chr\(115\)||chr\(101\)||chr\(114\)||chr\(115\)||chr\(39\)::regclass'\)\).then\(r=>{r.rows.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.tgname,x.tgenabled\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT tgname, tgenabled FROM pg_trigger t JOIN pg_class cl ON t.tgrelid=cl.oid JOIN pg_namespace n ON cl.relnamespace=n.oid WHERE n.nspname='auth' AND cl.relname='users'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{r.rows.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.tgname,x.tgenabled\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT usename, count\(*\) FROM pg_stat_activity GROUP BY usename ORDER BY count DESC\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT has_schema_privilege\('supabase_auth_admin', 'auth', 'USAGE'\) as usage, has_table_privilege\('supabase_auth_admin', 'auth.users', 'SELECT'\) as sel, has_table_privilege\('supabase_auth_admin', 'auth.schema_migrations', 'SELECT'\) as mig_sel\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT schemaname, tablename, n_dead_tup, last_autovacuum FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE schemaname='auth' ORDER BY n_dead_tup DESC LIMIT 10\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT grantee, privilege_type FROM information_schema.role_table_grants WHERE table_schema='auth' AND table_name='schema_migrations' AND grantee IN \('supabase_auth_admin','authenticator','postgres'\)\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT tableowner FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname='auth' AND tablename='schema_migrations'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SET ROLE supabase_auth_admin; SELECT version FROM auth.schema_migrations ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 3\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT count\(*\) as total FROM auth.users\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Total users:',r.rows[0].total\); return c.query\(\\"SELECT count\(*\) as total FROM auth.sessions\\"\)}\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Total sessions:',r.rows[0].total\); return c.query\(\\"SELECT count\(*\) as total FROM auth.refresh_tokens\\"\)}\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Total refresh_tokens:',r.rows[0].total\); return c.query\(\\"SELECT count\(*\) as total FROM auth.flow_state\\"\)}\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Total flow_state:',r.rows[0].total\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT pg_size_pretty\(pg_total_relation_size\(c.oid\)\) as size, c.relname FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace=n.oid WHERE n.nspname='auth' AND c.relkind='r' ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size\(c.oid\) DESC\\"\)\).then\(r=>{r.rows.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.relname,x.size\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT * FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='auth' AND table_name='schema_migrations'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{r.rows.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.column_name, x.data_type, x.is_nullable\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"ALTER TABLE auth.schema_migrations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS statements text[]\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Column added successfully'\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres:SLZ%402015%40eli@db.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl.supabase.co:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"ALTER TABLE auth.schema_migrations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS statements text[]\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Column added successfully'\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"GRANT supabase_auth_admin TO postgres\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Grant ok'\); return c.query\(\\"ALTER TABLE auth.schema_migrations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS statements text[]\\"\)}\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Column added'\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT rolname, rolsuper, rolcreaterole, rolcreatedb, rolinherit, rolcanlogin FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname IN \('postgres','supabase_admin','supabase_auth_admin','authenticator'\) ORDER BY rolname\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT r.rolname as member, r2.rolname as group FROM pg_auth_members m JOIN pg_roles r ON m.member=r.oid JOIN pg_roles r2 ON m.roleid=r2.oid WHERE r.rolname='postgres' OR r2.rolname='postgres'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT indexname, indexdef FROM pg_indexes WHERE schemaname='auth' AND tablename='users'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{r.rows.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.indexname\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT nspname, relname, pg_class.oid FROM pg_class JOIN pg_namespace ON pg_class.relnamespace=pg_namespace.oid WHERE nspname='auth' AND relkind='v'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT pid, usename, application_name, state, query FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE usename='supabase_auth_admin' OR application_name LIKE '%gotrue%' OR application_name LIKE '%auth%'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT pid, usename, application_name, state, backend_type, wait_event FROM pg_stat_activity ORDER BY usename\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT name, default_version, installed_version FROM pg_available_extensions WHERE name IN \('pgsodium','pgcrypto','uuid-ossp','supabase_vault'\) ORDER BY name\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT pid, wait_event_type, wait_event, state, query FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state='active' AND pid != pg_backend_pid\(\)\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\); return c.query\(\\"SELECT locktype, mode, granted, pid FROM pg_locks WHERE NOT granted\\"\)}\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Blocked locks:',JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT * FROM auth.sessions WHERE user_id='f6c8fa77-907d-4847-a0b3-bb07f21ae4e4'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT proname, prosrc FROM pg_proc p JOIN pg_namespace n ON p.pronamespace=n.oid WHERE n.nspname='public' AND prosrc LIKE '%auth%'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{r.rows.forEach\(x=>console.log\('---',x.proname,'---'\)\); console.log\('Found:',r.rows.length\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT tgname, tgrelid::regclass, proname FROM pg_trigger t JOIN pg_proc p ON t.tgfoid=p.oid JOIN pg_namespace n ON t.tgrelid IN \(SELECT oid FROM pg_class WHERE relnamespace=\(SELECT oid FROM pg_namespace WHERE nspname='auth'\)\) WHERE tgname NOT LIKE 'RI_%'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND \(table_name LIKE '%profile%' OR table_name LIKE '%role%' OR table_name LIKE '%module%' OR table_name LIKE '%access%' OR table_name LIKE '%permission%'\) ORDER BY table_name\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows.map\(x=>x.table_name\)\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='user_modules' AND table_schema='public' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Columns:',r.rows.map\(x=>x.column_name\)\); return c.query\(\\"SELECT um.*, p.email FROM public.user_modules um JOIN public.profiles p ON um.user_id=p.id ORDER BY p.email\\"\)}\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT um.*, p.email FROM public.user_modules um JOIN public.profiles p ON um.profile_id=p.id ORDER BY p.email\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"SELECT email, substring\(encrypted_password,1,10\) as hash_prefix, length\(encrypted_password\) as len FROM auth.users ORDER BY email\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; const{Client}=require\('pg'\); const c=new Client\({connectionString:'postgresql://postgres.juctfolupehtaoehjkwl:SLZ%402015%40eli@aws-1-sa-east-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres',ssl:true}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(\\"UPDATE auth.users SET encrypted_password = crypt\('123456', gen_salt\('bf', 10\)\), recovery_token = '', phone_change = '', phone_change_token = '', email_change_token_current = '', email_change_token_new = '', reauthentication_token = '', confirmation_token = '', updated_at = NOW\(\) WHERE id = 'f6c8fa77-907d-4847-a0b3-bb07f21ae4e4'\\"\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Updated rows:',r.rowCount\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);c.end\(\)}\);")
